events.event_description: Diplomatic relations and the American Legation in Lima were established when James Cooley presented his credentials as Chargé d'Affaires.

evidence.quote: Diplomatic relations and the American Legation in Lima were established on May 21, 1827, when James Cooley presented his credentials as Chargé d'Affaires.

events.event_description: The American Legation in Lima was elevated to Embassy status when Ambassador William E. Gonzales presented his credentials to the Peruvian Government.

evidence.quote: The Legation at Lima was raised to an Embassy on April 24, 1920, when Ambassador William E. Gonzales presented his credentials to the Peruvian Government.
